positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a constellation map merged with a celestial forest. The primary focus is a central cluster of interconnected geometric stars forming recognizable but abstract zodiac shapes. The forest elements should include stylized bioluminescent mushrooms, crystalline tree branches, and delicate, glowing flora, all rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and warm gold accents. The overall mood is mysterious and fantastical. Composition must feature clean, stark silhouettes against a deep indigo void. Highly detailed, symmetrical vaporwave aesthetic, vector art style, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
